title: PR4 3XE, Mr Thomas Pickervance: environmental permit issued - EPR/WP3423LX/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Thomas Pickervance   Installation name: New Hall Poultry Farm   Permit number: EPR/WP3423LX/A001   "
